title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Laurus Labs

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Laurus Labs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
